description: Aggregate data by different time periods (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)

variations.name: Aggregate daily sales data into weekly totals
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = trend_pipe | aggregate_by_time(
    date_column='transaction_date',
    metric_columns=['revenue', 'units_sold', 'unique_customers'],
    time_period='W',
    aggregation={'revenue': 'sum', 'units_sold': 'sum', 'unique_customers': 'nunique'},
    fill_missing=True,
    include_current_period=False
)

variations.name: Convert hourly traffic data to daily aggregates
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = trend_pipe | aggregate_by_time(
    date_column='timestamp',
    metric_columns=['visitors', 'page_views', 'bounce_rate', 'avg_session_duration'],
    time_period='D',
    aggregation={'visitors': 'sum', 'page_views': 'sum', 'bounce_rate': 'mean', 'avg_session_duration': 'mean'},
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
)

variations.name: Aggregate daily marketing data into monthly performance
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = trend_pipe | aggregate_by_time(
    date_column='date',
    metric_columns=['impressions', 'clicks', 'conversions', 'spend'],
    time_period='M',
    aggregation={'impressions': 'sum', 'clicks': 'sum', 'conversions': 'sum', 'spend': 'sum'},
    fill_missing=True,
    time_name='month_year'
)

variations.name: Convert transaction data to quarterly business summary
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = trend_pipe | aggregate_by_time(
    date_column='order_date',
    metric_columns=['revenue', 'cost', 'profit', 'order_count', 'avg_order_value'],
    time_period='Q',
    aggregation={'revenue': 'sum', 'cost': 'sum', 'profit': 'sum', 'order_count': 'count', 'avg_order_value': 'mean'},
    include_current_period=True
)

description: Calculate growth rates and percentage changes over time

variations.name: Calculate quarter-over-quarter growth rates
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue', 'users'], 'Q')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=1, annualize=False, method='percentage')
)

variations.name: Compute month-over-month percentage change
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['sales', 'conversions'], 'M')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=1, annualize=False, method='percentage')
)

variations.name: Calculate year-over-year growth rates
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue', 'customers'], 'M')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=12, annualize=False, method='percentage')
)

variations.name: Compute annualized growth rate from quarterly data
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue'], 'Q')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=1, annualize=True, method='cagr')
)

variations.name: Calculate log growth rates for financial data
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['stock_price', 'market_cap'], 'D')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=1, annualize=False, method='log')
)

description: Calculate various types of moving averages to smooth time series data

variations.name: Smooth weekly sales data using 4-week simple moving average
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['sales', 'revenue'], 'W')
    | calculate_moving_average(window=4, method='simple', center=False)
)

variations.name: Calculate 7-day exponential moving average of daily traffic
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['visitors', 'page_views'], 'D')
    | calculate_moving_average(window=7, method='exponential', center=False)
)

variations.name: Create 3-month weighted moving average of revenue
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue', 'profit'], 'M')
    | calculate_moving_average(window=3, method='weighted', center=False)
)

variations.name: Apply centered 5-day moving average to daily metrics
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['conversions', 'engagement'], 'D')
    | calculate_moving_average(window=5, method='simple', center=True)
)

variations.name: Calculate 12-month rolling average of monthly active users
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['active_users', 'new_users'], 'M')
    | calculate_moving_average(window=12, method='simple', center=False)
)

description: Decompose time series into trend, seasonal, and residual components

variations.name: Separate seasonal patterns from monthly active users trend
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['monthly_active_users'], 'M')
    | decompose_trend(metric_column='monthly_active_users', model='multiplicative', period=12, extrapolate_trend=6)
)

variations.name: Decompose daily sales data into trend and seasonal components
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['daily_sales'], 'D')
    | decompose_trend(metric_column='daily_sales', model='additive', period=7, extrapolate_trend=0)
)

variations.name: Extract seasonal patterns from quarterly revenue data
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['quarterly_revenue'], 'Q')
    | decompose_trend(metric_column='quarterly_revenue', model='multiplicative', period=4, extrapolate_trend=0)
)

variations.name: Analyze weekly website traffic for trend and seasonality
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['weekly_visitors'], 'W')
    | decompose_trend(metric_column='weekly_visitors', model='additive', period=52, extrapolate_trend=12)
)

variations.name: Decompose hourly server load into trend and cyclic components
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('timestamp', ['server_load'], 'H')
    | decompose_trend(metric_column='server_load', model='additive', period=24, extrapolate_trend=0)
)

description: Generate forecasts for future values using various forecasting methods

variations.name: Forecast revenue for next 3 months using Holt-Winters
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['monthly_revenue'], 'M')
    | forecast_metric(metric_column='monthly_revenue', fperiods=3, fmethod='holt_winters', seasonal_periods=12, confidence_interval=0.9)
)

variations.name: Predict daily active users for next 14 days using linear trend
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['daily_active_users'], 'D')
    | forecast_metric(metric_column='daily_active_users', fperiods=14, fmethod='linear', confidence_interval=0.95)
)

variations.name: Generate 6-month website traffic forecast with exponential smoothing
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['monthly_visitors'], 'M')
    | forecast_metric(metric_column='monthly_visitors', fperiods=6, fmethod='exponential', seasonal_periods=12, confidence_interval=0.95)
)

variations.name: Forecast quarterly sales for next year using Holt-Winters
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['quarterly_sales'], 'Q')
    | forecast_metric(metric_column='quarterly_sales', fperiods=4, fmethod='holt_winters', seasonal_periods=4, confidence_interval=0.8)
)

variations.name: Predict hourly website traffic pattern for next 24 hours
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('timestamp', ['hourly_visitors'], 'H')
    | forecast_metric(metric_column='hourly_visitors', fperiods=24, fmethod='holt_winters', seasonal_periods=24, confidence_interval=0.9)
)

description: Perform statistical tests to determine significance of trends

variations.name: Test for statistically significant upward trend in daily active users
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['daily_active_users'], 'D')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='daily_active_users', test_method='mann_kendall', alpha=0.05, window=30)
)

variations.name: Determine if conversion rate decline is statistically significant
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['conversion_rate'], 'D')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='conversion_rate', test_method='t_test', alpha=0.01, window=14)
)

variations.name: Analyze statistical significance of trends in quarterly revenue
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['quarterly_revenue'], 'Q')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='quarterly_revenue', test_method='spearman', alpha=0.05, window=12)
)

variations.name: Test for sustained growth using linear regression
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['monthly_active_users'], 'M')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='monthly_active_users', test_method='t_test', alpha=0.05, window=24)
)

variations.name: Check overall trend significance without rolling window
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['daily_page_views'], 'D')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='daily_page_views', test_method='mann_kendall', alpha=0.01)
)

description: Compare metrics across different time periods

variations.name: Compare this month's conversion metrics to same month last year
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['conversion_rate'], 'M')
    | compare_periods(metric_column='conversion_rate', comparison_type='year_over_year', n_periods=1, aggregation='mean')
)

variations.name: Compare current quarter performance with previous quarter
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue'], 'Q')
    | compare_periods(metric_column='revenue', comparison_type='period_over_period', n_periods=1, aggregation='sum')
)

variations.name: Analyze this week's metrics compared to 4 weeks ago
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['engagement_rate'], 'W')
    | compare_periods(metric_column='engagement_rate', comparison_type='week_over_week', n_periods=4, aggregation='mean')
)

variations.name: Compare holiday season performance with same period last year
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['sales'], 'M')
    | compare_periods(metric_column='sales', comparison_type='year_over_year', n_periods=1, aggregation='sum')
)

variations.name: Compare current month metrics with 3 months ago
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['active_users'], 'M')
    | compare_periods(metric_column='active_users', comparison_type='month_over_month', n_periods=3, aggregation='mean')
)

description: Identify top performing metrics by growth rate or other criteria

variations.name: Identify fastest growing product categories by revenue
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue', 'units_sold', 'customers'], 'M')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=1, method='percentage')
)
top_growth = get_top_metrics(n=5, metric_type='growth', ascending=False)(trend_pipe)

variations.name: Find top 10 fastest growing user segments by engagement
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['engagement_rate', 'session_duration', 'page_views'], 'W')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=4, method='percentage')
)
top_segments = get_top_metrics(n=10, metric_type='growth', ascending=False)(trend_pipe)

variations.name: Identify worst performing channels by conversion rate decline
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['conversion_rate'], 'D')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=7, method='percentage')
)
worst_channels = get_top_metrics(n=5, metric_type='growth', ascending=True)(trend_pipe)

variations.name: Find top 3 regions with highest revenue growth rate
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue'], 'M')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=12, method='percentage')
)
top_regions = get_top_metrics(n=3, metric_type='growth', ascending=False)(trend_pipe)

variations.name: List 5 products with most significant decline in monthly sales
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['monthly_sales'], 'M')
    | calculate_growth_rates(window=1, method='percentage')
)
declining_products = get_top_metrics(n=5, metric_type='growth', ascending=True)(trend_pipe)

variations.name: Find metrics with most significant statistical trends
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue', 'users', 'conversions'], 'M')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='revenue')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='users')
    | calculate_statistical_trend(metric_column='conversions')
)
trending_metrics = get_top_metrics(n=3, metric_type='trend', ascending=False)(trend_pipe)

variations.name: Identify most volatile metrics
variations.example:
trend_pipe = TrendPipe.from_dataframe(data)
trend_pipe = (trend_pipe 
    | aggregate_by_time('date', ['revenue', 'users', 'conversions'], 'D')
)
volatile_metrics = get_top_metrics(n=5, metric_type='volatility', ascending=False)(trend_pipe)
